runTitle: v8.11.60 Vercel Production QA - AI Sidebar QueryAsOf and Cerebras Fallback Recheck

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar cache memory cause/action analysis
aiLatencyObservations.source: UI footer + browser Performance API + Cloud Run logs

expertAssessments.rationale: The previously failing cache memory analysis now renders a complete main answer even when Cerebras Qwen returns queue_exceeded.
The v8.11.60 GitLab tag pipeline deployed both Vercel frontend and Cloud Run AI Engine, and all post-deploy smoke jobs passed.
The run used a fresh Playwright browser session, UI-only CSRF-safe submission, and Performance API evidence for EventSource streams.
The 81% dashboard value and 82% AI value are explained by slot 110 versus query-time slot 111, matching the queryAsOf slot contract.

usageChecks.summary: Active period effective usage 19.0897 USD and billed usage 0.0000 USD after v8.11.60 production deploy.

completedImprovements.title: Deploy query-as-of metric slot fix to Vercel production
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.11.60 production /api/version reports 6d97486d1 and GitLab tag pipeline 2487846461 succeeded.

completedImprovements.title: Prevent empty main AI analysis response when Cerebras queue or token quota fails
completedImprovements.evidence: Cerebras Qwen queue_exceeded recurred, but the main AI sidebar response included root cause, causal chain, and three immediate actions.

notes: Fresh Playwright MCP session was used.
Dashboard baseline: Vercel static OTel 18:20 KST slot 110/143, total 18, online 17, warning 1, critical 0, offline 0, cache-redis-dc1-01 MEM 81%.
Query-time AI slot: 18:30 KST slot 111/143, cache-redis-dc1-01 MEM 82%; this is expected queryAsOf behavior.
Query 1 PASS: server summary returned total 18, normal 17, warning 1, critical 0, offline 0.
Query 2 PASS: cache memory cause/action answer no longer collapsed to heading-only text.
Cloud Run logs confirmed Cerebras Qwen queue_exceeded still occurred, so this run exercised the provider fallback regression path.
